properties.sql:
SELECT
    f01.id AS farm_id,
    f0101.c_national_id,
    f0101.c_personal_information,
    f02.id AS parcel_id,
    f0201.c_farmer_id,
    f0201.c_district,
    f0202.c_area_hectares,
    f0202.c_vertex_count
FROM app_fd_farms_registry f01
JOIN app_fd_farmerBasicInfo f0101
    ON f01.c_basic_data = f0101.id
JOIN app_fd_parcelLocation f0201
    ON f0101.c_national_id = f0201.c_farmer_id
JOIN app_fd_parcelRegistration f02
    ON f02.c_general_data = f0201.id
JOIN app_fd_parcelGeometry f0202
    ON f02.c_location = f0202.id
WHERE ('#requestParam.farm_id#' = '' OR f01.id = '#requestParam.farm_id#')
